results.title: Judge temporarily blocks Pentagon's ban on Anthropic - Axios
results.snippet: A federal judge on Thursday paused the Trump administration's designation of Anthropic as a supply chain risk, marking an early legal victory for the embattled company. Why it matters: Anthropic argued that the designation was causing immediate and irreparable harm as business partners rethink their contracts and federal agencies remove Claude.

results.title: US judge blocks Pentagon's Anthropic blacklisting for now
results.snippet: A U.S. judge on Thursday temporarily blocked the Pentagon's blacklisting of Anthropic , the latest turn in the Claude maker's high-stakes fight with the military over ‌ AI safety on the battlefield.

results.title: US Judge Blocks Pentagon's Anthropic Blacklisting for Now
results.snippet: March 26 (Reuters) - A U.S. judge on Thursday temporarily blocked the ⁠ Pentagon's ⁠blacklisting of Anthropic , the latest turn in ⁠the Claude maker's high-stakes fight with the military over ...
